import pandas as pd

names_data = locals()['var_function-call-7561685680214396889']

df_counts = pd.DataFrame(counts_data)
df_names = pd.DataFrame(names_data)

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(df_counts, df_names, on='gmap_id')

# Select columns
result_list = merged[['name', 'count']].to_dict(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
